recentArticles.title: Kehlani’s new self-titled project is a no-skip album — Album Review - MELODIC Magazine
recentArticles.snippet: ### Kehlani’s new self-titled project is a no-skip album — Album Review. # Kehlani’s new self-titled project is a no-skip album — Album Review. It’s followed by her biggest track yet, “Folded” — the single earning Best R&B Song and Best R&B Performance at this years Grammys speaks for itself. “I Need You” featuring Brandy is arguably one of the top three on the album, and it’s because she manages to bring back the Princess of R&B and also blend in a modern sound and production that feels like a ode to the genre overall. Three more solo tracks, “You Got It,” “Call Me Back,” and “Still” are all heartfelt, vulnerable and reflective to the new, mature sound Kehlani carries throughout this album in comparison to her past projects. Kehlani and Cardi B together create some of the best hip-hop/R&B songs, just like on Cardi’s newest album with “Safe.” We’re hoping for more future collaborations between the two. Kehlani outdid herself with this album, showcasing her true love as a fan and artist of R&B.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Drops New Self-Titled Album – Listen Now! - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Drops New Self-Titled Album - Listen Now! **Kehlani** is back with new music! On Friday (April 24), the 31-year-old Grammy-winning singer debuted her brand new album, titled ***Kehlani***. “I am honored to present you with the album,” **Kehlani** wrote on Instagram after the album’s release. In a new interview with *Complex*, **Kehlani** opened up about the two-year process she went through while creating the album, which began with her working through some emotional baggage. “I went and locked myself in the room, and I started randomly processing a bunch of things from 2020,” **Kehlani** recalled. After getting out of her system, **Kehlani** resumed the process of making the album. If you didn’t see, **Kehlani** is nominated for three awards at the *2026 American Music Awards*, which are taking place on May 25 with **Queen Latifah** as host. recentArticles.title: 'We have no sleep': What it's like to run a round-the-clock celebrity fan page - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: "I feel like we have no sleep - we're at this 24 hours a day, seven days a week," says 25-year-old Canadian, Jay. He's a researcher for the social media account Buzzing Pop, which has 250,000 followers on X and posts round-the-clock news and gossip about the biggest celebrities in the world. "We're always keeping up - it's crazy but we love it," says Jay. Jay is part of a new generation of social media creators whose job it is to provide constant updates on fans' favourite film, TV and music stars. He says he started his fan account to "feel a bit closer" to the star, adding "I got likes from Taylor Swift, follows from her dancers and her team". And while Buzzing Pop is not dedicated to a single celebrity or music artist, Jay says his team works hard to keep their posts "neutral and informative".
recentArticles.summary: 這篇BBC報導描述了名為Jay的社群媒體研究員，如何為一個涵蓋多位名人的粉絲專頁Buzzing Pop提供24小時不間斷的資訊，但內容並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Beloved ABC host and rock musician dead at 64 after assisted suicide: ‘Did it his way’ - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # Beloved ABC host and rock musician dead at 64 after assisted suicide: ‘Did it his way’. James Valentine, a popular ABC radio and television host for more than 30 years and a rock musician, has died. Valentine died by assisted suicide at home two years after he was diagnosed with cancer, **according to multiple reports.**. “Throughout his illness, James did it his way, which lasted all the way until the day when he made the choice to do voluntary assisted dying,” the statement continued. He was a saxophonist, and his music career took off in 1982 when he was a member of Jo Jo Zep. He also played with Model from 1984 to 1987 and Absent Friends from 1989 to 1990. Valentine hosted radio and television shows for ABC for nearly 40 years. He worked for 702 ABC Sydney for more than 25 years before retiring because of his illness. Add pennlive.com as a Preferred Source by clicking here.
recentArticles.summary: 資深ABC主持人兼搖滾音樂家James Valentine因癌症選擇安樂死，享年64歲。

recentArticles.title: Ex-Warriors star Klay Thompson accused of cheating off the court - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Ex-Warriors star Klay Thompson accused of cheating off the court. Klay Thompson has been accused of cheating … again, and this time there’s no defensive scheme a coach can draw up to help him. Thompson, now with the Mavericks and a former four-time NBA champion with the Warriors, found himself at the center of a storm Saturday after musician Megan Thee Stallion, whom he has been in a relationship with since last summer, publicly accused him of cheating on her. It wasn’t just the accusation — which is not the first time Thompson has been accused of infidelity — it was the tone. Megan famously spent holidays with Thompson and his family. Megan repeatedly showed up courtside to Thompson’s games. Thompson was most recently spotted with his mother, Julie, on April 14 at Megan’s Broadway performance of “Moulin Rouge.”. In a statement to our very own Page Six, Megan said it was her decision to end the relationship with Thompson. Thompson has yet to respond to Megan’s claims.

recentArticles.title: Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York - Fakta.co
recentArticles.snippet: # Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York. Actor Matt Dillon launched his debut solo art exhibition at The Journal Gallery in New York on Friday, April 24, 2026. "It’s not meant to be a literal description of the work or place, but rather the feeling behind the work," said Michael Nevin, Co-founder of The Journal Gallery. Julia Dippelhofer, the gallery's other co-founder, described Dillon's approach to gathering inspiration during his journeys. He will pick up found textbooks or old newspapers to be repurposed as sketchbooks," said Julia Dippelhofer, Co-founder of The Journal Gallery. "He is like a sponge and a great storyteller," said Julia Dippelhofer, Co-founder of The Journal Gallery. ## Vancouver Whitecaps Face Relocation Risks Amid Record Winning Streak. ## Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York. ## Vancouver Whitecaps Face Relocation Risks Amid Record Winning Streak. ## Matt Dillon Debuts West African Inspired Art Exhibition in New York.

recentArticles.title: Jay’s imprint clear as Cards’ outfield, baserunning stay sharp - MLB.com
recentArticles.snippet: For Jay, the trip to Miami added a personal element, but his influence continues to show in how the Cardinals prepare and play. “It’s always good to come back home,” Jay said. From pregame work to in-game execution, Jay has helped shape how the Cardinals’ outfielders and baserunners operate, influencing both their positioning in the field and awareness on the bases. The Cardinals recorded an outfield assist during the game when Nathan Church threw from right field to third base, helping erase Javier Sanoja in a rundown, the third of the series. “That’s a big credit to [Jay], working with him on base running and stuff like [where to position myself],” Walker said. “Talking to [Jay], like every four at-bats, he just reminds me of what the pitcher does, how quick he is to the plate, what the situation is, to kind of keep it running for my brain, so I can just have in the back of my mind so I can, you know, take advantage of the situation if need be.”. “The biggest thing is this game is not easy, and you're gonna make mistakes,” Jay said.

recentArticles.title: The Stars Brought a Parade of Fashion to the 2026 Time100 Gala - Harper's BAZAAR
recentArticles.snippet: 3. The Stars Brought a Parade of Fashion to the 2026 Time100 Gala. The hottest red carpet in New York City last night took place at Jazz at Lincoln Center, where everyone from Hailey Bieber to Anok Yai, to Hilary Duff, Zoe Saldaña, Dakota Johnson, and Jennie came together for the Time100 Gala. Bieber and Johnson went for icy looks—Bieber in a lacy floral dress in silver, and Johnson in an ivory cape gown embellished with crystals. Saldaña’s was a ruffled, asymmetric Givenchy dress with white trim, while the Blackpink member’s was a business-like Schiaparelli look with a corset bodice, a skinny belt placed over a sheer panel, and a velvet pencil skirt. After the red carpet, guests are treated to a performance and a dinner. Ahead, see some of the best red-carpet looks of the night. ## Red Carpet Dresses. recentArticles.title: BTS Kicks Off Their ARIRANG Tour In The US: What To Expect - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # BTS Kicks Off Their ARIRANG Tour In The US: What To Expect. BTS touched down in Tampa, Florida on April 25, opening the North American leg of the *ARIRANG* World Tour at Raymond James Stadium — the first U.S. dates of a global run spanning more than 85 dates in 34 cities across 23 countries, from April 2026 through March 2027. ## Why The BTS ARIRANG World Tour Matters. The early portion of the show moves through "Aliens" and "Run BTS" before a mid-show pivot to more melodic *Arirang* tracks including "Swim" and "Merry-Go-Round," the latter performed with dancers using fabric and lighting to recreate the imagery of a working carousel. "Body to Body," the *ARIRANG* opener that incorporates the traditional folk melody, is performed with the full ensemble moving through extended stages surrounded by flags bearing the ARIRANG symbol — a moment in which the crowd at Goyang sang the folk portion back to the group. ## BTS ARIRANG Tour Tickets: How To Get Them. ## BTS ARIRANG Tour 2026: Full Dates And Venues.

recentArticles.title: 'SNL UK': Nicola Coughlan Monologue Features Jimmy Fallon, Dave Grohl - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jimmy Fallon, Dave Grohl Make Cameos in Nicola Coughlan’s ‘SNL UK’ Monologue. Foo Fighters are booked as musical guest on this weekend’s *SNL UK*, but fans didn’t have to wait for the band’s live performance to air for their first Dave Grohl spotting of the night. After making a monologue joke about consuming “a staggering amount of cocaine” to recreate “the magic of original 1970s *SNL*,” Coughlan says in the video, “But look, it’s an honor to be hosting. “Don’t tell anyone, but … it’s *live*,” Fallon says. It’s Dave Grohl,” Coughlan says in a hushed tone upon spotting the Foo Fighters vocalist, to which Fallon suggests, “You should ask him to be best friends — because we’re *live*. Watch Coughlan’s *SNL* monologue, featuring Jimmy Fallon plus a cameo from Dave Grohl, in the video below uploaded to the official SNK UK YouTube channel. ### Want to know what everyone in the music business is talking about?

recentArticles.title: Demi Lovato Explains How Disney Channel Nostalgia ‘Definitely’ Reconnected Her With Selena Gomez & Joe Jonas - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Earlier today, she unveiled the deluxe version, *It’s Not That Deep (Unless You Want It to Be)*, featuring eight brand new songs, including “Low Rise Jeans,” which fans went crazy for when Lovato debuted the sultry track on the opening night of the It’s Not That Deep Tour. Lovato tells *Billboard* that they think the new songs “add so much” to the already deeply (no pun intended) meaningful *It’s Not That Deep* era. At MSG, Lovato kept the crowd energized with a mix of *It’s Not That Deep* standouts and older smashes, including Billboard Hot 100 hits “Heart Attack,” “Sorry Not Sorry” and “Cool For The Summer.” She also had two surprises in store for the New York City crowd, singing “Too Little Too Late” with special guest JoJo before performing live for the first time ever with husband Jutes. “I think the age that we’re at is really loving nostalgia right now,” Lovato tells *Billboard*.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani releases highly-anticipated self-titled album - The AU Review
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani releases highly-anticipated self-titled album. **Kehlani** marks her birthday with the release of her fifth studio album, ***KEHLANI***, a project that feels deliberately stripped back to the essence of who she is as an artist. Self-titled albums often carry that weight of identity, and here it comes through in the emotional clarity of the songwriting – intimate, reflective, and unafraid to sit in discomfort. The album doesn’t reach outward so much as it settles inward, offering a clearer, more grounded reflection of an artist who knows exactly what she wants to say – and how she wants it to feel. * John Vincent III releases his much anticipated sophomore album, Songs…. * Tusks releases new single "Adore", and announces new album GOLD. * AYLA announces debut album Dopamine and releases a single to celebrate. * Georgia Lines releases her stunning debut album, The Rose of Jericho. * Ruel releases third single from his upcoming album Kicking My Feet.

Kehlani, fresh off taking home two Grammys and sitting down for an interview with Complex’s Jillian Superstar, is back with a new album. The development of that track, as Kehlani recently explained to Complex, proved instrumental in a period of artistic growth reflected on the new album. Elsewhere in her recent Complex interview, Kehlani also looked back on how impactful Nick Cannon’s early support was for her journey as an artist, calling him a “great guy.” In fact, according to her, there are actually multiple artists who have similar stories about the *Wild ’n Out* creator and *All That* alum. recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Heading Toward $85 Million-Plus Opening Weekend At Box Office - Yahoo News UK
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ Heading Toward $85 Million-Plus Opening Weekend At Box Office. The Michael Jackson biopic *Michael* is projected to earn more than $85 million in its opening weekend at the domestic box office. *Michael*, which stars Jaafar Jackson (Michael Jackson’s nephew/Jermaine Jackson’s son) in the title role, officially opened in North American theaters on Friday after special Wednesday night fan screenings and Thursday previews. As such, if a projection for its opening weekend by *Deadline* published on Friday night is any indication, Michael is taking a big first step toward its aspirations to make a sequel a reality. Lionsgate announced in an email Friday that *Michael* earned $3.8 million at fan screenings Wednesday night before playing in previews Thursday night, which resulted in a two-day domestic total of $12.6 million. Lionsgate also announced Friday that *Michael* also opened with $18.5 million in ticket sales in 82 international markets on Wednesday.

recentArticles.title: OKP’s Biggest Takeaways From Kehlani’s Self-Titled New Album - Okayplayer
recentArticles.snippet: Listening to Kehlani’s latest feels like my mom’s driving me to the first day of 7th grade 22 years ago, and from the jump, it’s clear that that’s the point. The retro R&B aesthetic feels more like a tool rather than an endgame, with her tender, yet sultry vocals and introspection making the production feel inhabited instead of “used.” Crash, on the other hand, felt scattershot, with Kehlani shifting between sonics with a clumsiness that was kind of unbefitting of her vocal talent and songwriting. * #### The Listening: New Music From Kehlani, Reason, Fredo Bang & BigXThaPlug Latto & GloRilla and More. missy elliott kehlani brandy big sean new music t-pain usher. * #### The Listening: New Music From Kehlani, Reason, Fredo Bang & BigXThaPlug Latto & GloRilla and More. missy elliott kehlani brandy big sean new music news t-pain usher. * #### The Listening: New Music From Kehlani, Reason, Fredo Bang & BigXThaPlug Latto & GloRilla and More.

recentArticles.title: Jada Pinkett Smith asks court to make Will Smith’s former friend pay her $49,000 legal bills - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: * Bilaal Salaam sued after airing podcast allegations about the Smiths’ private lives, which Pinkett Smith characterized as a “money shakedown” and part of a broader attempt to extort her. Jada Pinkett Smith is asking a judge to make Bilaal Salaam cover the $49,000 in legal fees she racked up fighting claims he made in a December lawsuit. According to a motion filed April 20 and obtained by The Times, Pinkett Smith is asking that Salaam pay $49,181.23, consisting of “reasonable attorneys’ fees incurred” in connection with Pinkett Smith’s successful special motion to strike Salaam’s complaint, “plus further fees and costs associated with this motion.”. Salaam’s suit claims that Pinkett Smith told him he would “end up missing or catch a bullet” if he kept “telling her personal business.” She also allegedly pressured him to sign a non-disclosure agreement. Pinkett Smith swiftly responded during an appearance on “The Breakfast Club” and said that Salaam started the rumors as part of a broader “money shakedown” and that his claims were “ridiculous and nonsense.”.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導關於Jada Pinkett Smith與Bilaal Salaam的法律糾紛，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed - KNAU
recentArticles.snippet: Arizona Public Radio continues to integrate new audio software while addressing remaining glitches. # Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed. And so I started making poor decisions," Jay said. "The next night I made a plan of how to do it, and I did it," Jay remembered. Jay made a plan to end his life. He said yes, and listened as the man began to pray. "I wish I could tell you that I remember the [exact] words that he said to me, but what I remember is that his words landed with me, and instead of wanting my life to be over, suddenly I saw hope," Jay said. The interaction happened nearly ten years ago, but it was a pivotal moment in Jay's life, and one he thinks about all the time. Jay says that he wishes he could meet that man again and express his appreciation.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容講述一位名為Jay的男子在獄中重獲希望的個人故事，與華語歌手周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: The Legacy Of Michael Jackson Pondered Anew As ‘Michael’ Hits Theaters - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: “This is monumental,” said Gary, Indiana mayor Eddie Melton, taking to the red carpet as the new Michael Jackson biopic *Michael* premiered last week in the Steel City. “I’m so grateful to be able to be here,” said Jaafar Jackson, who portrays his uncle Michael in his acting debut and received the key to the city of Gary following a screening of the film. But he just carried himself with that grace and that humility,” said Michael’s oldest child (siblings ‘Bigi’ and Paris Jackson did not attend). “I think folks are starting to recognize that Gary is able to compete on a global scale,” said Mayor Melton. Dubbed “The First Lady of House Music,” Mazelle sang lead on Soul II Soul’s 1990 hit “Missing You.” Growing up down the street from the Jackson family in Gary, Mazelle now works extensively with kids in a music and mentorship role. “What Michael Jackson did so well was bring people together through his music,” said the producer.
recentArticles.summary: 麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》在故鄉加里市首映，獲得市長、家人及當地社區的熱烈歡迎與高度讚揚，共同慶祝其音樂遺產與正面影響。

recentArticles.title: Olivia Rodrigo Praises Justin Bieber’s ‘Epic’ Coachella Set: ‘It Was Really Powerful’ - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The Dirty Nil are additionally slated to perform at the Burlington waterfront fest — operated by MRG Live — which will see over 30 acts performing between three music stages at Spencer Smith Park from June 20-21. Returning to their hometown, Walk off the Earth will bring their 2010s hits to the stage, including “Red Hands,” which hit No. 9 on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100, the band’s highest charting single in Canada. According to an initial concept — shared in a one-page brief in February — the festival includes three stages, including a main performance stage that’s filled with a lineup of hometown musicians from several music genres, with a “notable Canadian headliner” closing out each evening. The Lakeshore Music & Arts Festival will maintain Sound of Music’s free ticket structure, but will implement paid VIP ticket tiers to “enhance the visitor experience.” The brief outlined that the planned VIP section features premium seating, exclusive food and drink options, merchandise and artist meet-and-greet experiences.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要報導加拿大音樂節相關資訊，未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Nikki Glaser Roasts Katy Perry, Hailey Bieber, Victoria Beckham and More at Time 100 Gala - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # Nikki Glaser Roasts Katy Perry, Hailey Bieber, Victoria Beckham and More at Time 100 Gala. Fresh off hosting the last two Golden Globe Awards, the comedian didn't hold back at this year's event honoring the magazine's picks for the world's most influential people. Glaser hosted the 20th annual Time 100 Gala on Thursday night at Jazz at Lincoln Center in New York City, which celebrates *Time*‘s list of the world’s most influential people. And in true Glaser style, she made it a roast, playfully taking jabs at Katy Perry, Hailey Bieber, Victoria Beckham, MrBeast, Kate Hudson and more, as well as *Time* itself. “Welcome to the Time 100, the one list you actually want to be on this year,” the comedian said to a star-studded crowd kicking off the event. “One of the most impressive people on the list is Victoria Beckham, of course. ### How an 18-Year-Old TikToker’s Scientology “Run” Inspired a Trend — and Why He Says It’s Gone Too Far. The Hollywood Reporter is a part of Penske Media Corporation.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Nikki Glaser在Time 100 Gala上對多位名人進行幽默調侃，內容中並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.snippet: # Noah Kahan, Kehlani, Suki Waterhouse   Kehlani releases her classic R  and Suki Waterhouse previews her upcoming album *Loveland* out this summer… plus much more. Since releasing his self-produced debut album, *Westward*, last year, rising singer-songwriter Dylan Gossett has kept momentum with new music including latest track “My Boy.” As the title suggests, the song is a beautiful message to his son (his and his wife’s first child, which they announced on Instagram last November) that functions as Gossett’s parental vow.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani’s self-titled album tracks ranked from worst to best - Rolling Out
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani’s self-titled album tracks ranked from worst to best. Oakland R&B star blends nostalgia, vocals, and legacy collabs in a genre-shaping album. Kehlani’s self-titled album arrives after a decade of steady growth from mixtape standout to mainstream R&B force. The album draws heavily from 1990s and 2000s R&B, not as imitation but as reference point. Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis contribute to the album’s more classic R&B textures, while other tracks lean into contemporary polish. Big Sean)** – Smooth but relatively understated mid-album moment. Usher)** – Classic R&B breakup exchange with polished delivery. Cardi B)** – Lively collaboration with strong mainstream appeal. Folded** – The project’s defining hit and emotional anchor. Unlearn** – Gospel-leaning closer that ties the album’s emotional themes together. By the final track, Kehlani reads less like a diary and more like a reflection on R&B itself. * album, charts, Collaboration, Folded, Kehlani, Music, Pop, ranking, review, rnb.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於歌手Kehlani的專輯評論與歌曲排名，與周杰倫無直接關聯。
